message:
fix: clippy and rustfmt cleanups across source and test files

- runtime_diagnostics.rs: change &PathBuf parameter to idiomatic &Path per
  clippy::ptr_arg, update import from PathBuf to Path
- franken_lockstep_runner.rs: rustfmt reformatting of if-let block and
  chained method call indentation
- franken_lockstep_runner_cli.rs: rustfmt line-wrapping for long assertions
- rgc_cli_operator_workflow_verification_pack.rs: rustfmt reformatting of
  long lines and array formatting
- global_coherence_checker_integration.rs: remove unused BTreeMap import
- session_hostcall_channel_enrichment_integration.rs: remove unused
  ChannelPayload and SessionChannelEvent imports
- slot_registry_enrichment_integration.rs: remove unused PromotionTransition
  and SlotEntry imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
